meta.note: Counts are over the project's harvested AMASS trialcore set (trials matching the drug-repurposing vocabulary), deduplicated by NCT ID. This is a representative sample, not the full 1.2M-trial AMASS index. A trial with multiple conditions contributes to each disease it matches, so disease counts sum to more than the unique-trial total. Stratification uses MeSH condition terms where present (83% of trials), else free-text conditions.
